description_long: This lamp features a robust, industrial design with a tall, angular black frame and four articulated arms extending outward, each tipped with a flat, angular segment. The base is square with a yellow-and-black hazard stripe pattern, suggesting a utilitarian or safety-conscious application. Several colored wires (red, blue, and yellow) are visibly routed along the arms, adding a technical, exposed-mechanism aesthetic. The central column is reinforced and includes a digital display panel, with one side showing a 'BREAKING' warning sign. The lamp's surfaces are matte and hard, with some blue accent panels and a generally mechanical appearance. Its overall form and details suggest it is designed for urban or industrial environments, possibly as a high-tech street or area lamp.
description: A tall, industrial-style lamp with four articulated black arms, exposed colored wiring, and a hazard-striped base, featuring digital display panels and a 'BREAKING' warning sign.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'BREAKING' warning sign, two main arms, and visible wiring along the left side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetrical arrangement of the four arms and the colored wires running through the center.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the blue digital display panel and the angular structure of the arms, with wiring more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the back of the arms, the blue accent panel, and the wiring connections at the top.
